home.heroSubtext: Sonrise Ministry is dedicated to spreading hope through service, compassion, and faith.
home.aboutText: Sonrise Ministry is committed to uplifting communities through social service, charity work, and spiritual outreach. Our mission is to bring hope, help the needy, and serve with love.

foodCard.heading: Food Distribution
foodCard.text: Providing meals to the needy and homeless.

educationCard.heading: Education Support
educationCard.text: Helping children with study materials and guidance.

outreachCard.heading: Community Outreach
outreachCard.text: Supporting families through care and prayer programs.

home.footerText: © 2026 Sonrise Ministry | Serving with Faith & Love

food.heroSubtext: Providing meals to the needy and homeless with love and dignity
food.section1Text1: Our food distribution program provides nutritious meals to families in need, ensuring that no one goes hungry in our community.
food.section1Text2: We work with local partners to identify those most in need and deliver meals with dignity and compassion.
food.section2Text1: Our weekly community meals bring families together in fellowship and nourishment. We serve hot, nutritious meals to anyone in need, regardless of background or circumstances.
food.section2Text2: These meals are not just about food—they are opportunities to build community, show love, and provide hope to those who need it most.

education.heroSubtext: Helping children with study materials and guidance for a brighter future
education.section1Text1: We believe that education is a powerful tool for transformation. Our programs are designed to empower children with the knowledge, skills, and confidence they need to build a better future.
education.section1Text2: Our work goes beyond textbooks and classrooms—we nurture the whole child, helping them grow not just academically, but emotionally and spiritually.
education.section2Text1: We provide study materials and one-on-one tutoring to help students succeed academically. Our volunteers work closely with children to improve their understanding of core subjects and build confidence in their learning journey.
education.section2Text2: Our goal is to ensure that every child has access to the resources and support they need to thrive in school and beyond.

outreach.heroSubtext: Supporting families through care, prayer programs, and community building
outreach.section1Text1: We work to build strong, supportive communities by bringing people together through shared values and mutual care. Our initiatives focus on fostering connections between neighbors, families, and individuals.
outreach.section1Text2: Through community events, volunteer opportunities, and collaborative projects, we help create environments where everyone feels valued and supported.
outreach.section2Text1: We offer family support and prayer programs to strengthen relationships and provide spiritual care. These initiatives help families navigate challenges with faith, hope, and community support.
outreach.section2Text2: Our prayer groups and family counseling sessions create safe spaces for healing, growth, and connection within the community.
